SaleS 	Script

-- 2 of 4 --

Original Sales Script
INTRO: Hi name i have two outcomes for our call today.
TheN TRusT aNd RappORT: My first outcome is to learn about your business and
share some ideas that will help you reach your long-term and short-term business goals. Our
company specializes in helping business owners like you make your business more profitable
online. also i want to encourage you to take some notes. Some of the ideas i’m going to share
with you, you are going to want to write down. can you get a pen and paper?
My second outcome is to share with you how our company can assist you beyond
today’s strategy session. at the end of our call i will give you the details about working with
_____________________ _______Sound good?
(let them respond and listen).
great, to get started give me the reader’s Digest version of your business.
pRObINg QuesTIONs (ask The RelevaNT ONes):
1. 	are you affiliate Marketing?
2. 	Do you have a website?
3. 	Do you have a Squeeze page?
4. 	Do you have an auto responder system?
5. 	Do you have an ezine?
6. 	How many subscribers do you have?
7. 	How often do you sent email to your list?
8. 	Where have you gotten your internet education so far?
9. 	are you affiliate Marketing?
10. What is your current Marketing system?
11. if i could wave a magic wand and improve your business online how would you want to
improve?
(let them tell you this. this is usually how we can most help them)
What i would like to do now is share with your some background about __________and
about the company. i will also share some specific ideas you can use in your business.
_________has been making and teaching how to make money online for many years. During
that time he has spent thousands of hours and tens of thousands of dollars to learn what
works and what doesn’t work online. _________has perfected his ideas and developed several
systems that small businesses can use to make money. these systems include driving traffic to
your website, turning traffic into leads, and then ultimately turning leads into customers.
the foundation of your online success is certain tools that you need to work to master like:
Squeeze pages and auto responders and ppc traffic to start building a database and your list.
You want your web site to motivate your visitors to give you their email address. the reason
for this is so you can market to them for life for free. __________is one of the best at teaching
people how to build their email lists and ppc Marketing so they can profit from them for years

-- 3 of 4 --

to come. One way to motivate someone to give their email address is to offer them a free
special report. (Show them examples that you like)
it is important that you have a database to electronically store all of the leads that your web
site generates. let’s take a look at your web site. (pull up their web site and see if they have a
way to generate leads. also find out if they have a database like www.oneshoppingcart.com or
www.aweber.com storing their data).
Your first key point is to have your web site offer something that will motivate the visitors to
give their email address, in exchange for value.
if we were able to help you generate more leads how would that help you?
leT Them RespONd.
(What we are trying to do here is find out the benefit to them to get
more leads for their business).
the next business building idea is to generate leads using Joint Ventures. an example of this
is ___________might contact someone else that has an email list. the list might have 35,000
emails on it. _________and the owner of the list work out an agreement where the list owner
promotes __________to his list of 35,000. in most cases, ______is able to get the list owner
to do this with no upfront expense. in other words, ______gets 35,000 marketing impressions
at a small cost. are you currently doing any joint ventures? let them respond. Would you be
interested in learning how to do joint ventures like the one i just described?
What i would like to do now is share with you about our one on one coaching and
mentoring program. this is your opportunity to be trained by ________ coaches with a small
group.
there is one reason for this. So you get the personalized attention you need to succeed.
and that is what is most important....wouldn’t you agree?
(let them respond).
as i mentioned earlier there are only a few total slots available. Would you like one of these
slots? great this is what i need do to get you enrolled and started with a coach.

-- 4 of 4 --
